About us
ACCELQ is the only cloud-based continuous testing platform that seamlessly automates API and web testing without writing a single line of code. IT teams of all sizes use ACCELQ to accelerate their testing by automating critical aspects of lifecycle like test design, planning, test generation, and execution.

A few highlights:
- Codeless natural language Functional, API Automation
- No IDE, Fully browser-based 
- Visualize and drive quality with ACCELQ Universe
- Design/Automate/Maintain your testing 3X Faster
Website
https://www.accelq.com
External link for ACCELQ

Specialties
Application lifecycle management, Quality Lifecycle Automation, Quality Assurance, Continuous Testing, Agile Quality, Quality Driven Development, API Test Automation, Customer Experience, API Services Testing, Business Process Validation, Continuous Testing, BDD, TDD, Test Automation, and Regression Testing
Products
ACCELQ Unified
ACCELQ Unified
Automated Testing Software
ACCELQ Unified is an AI-powered Codeless Test Automation platform on cloud that seamlessly automates Web UI, API, Mobile, Desktop. ACCELQ was analyzed as leader in the latest Continuous Test Automation platform Forrester research. ACCELQ customers are Fortune 500 enterprises across industry verticals globally, and they have adopted ACCELQ to significantly accelerate their automation objectives. ACCELQ is proven to speed up automation development by 3 times and bring down the maintenance 70% that translates to over 50% of cost savings and enables alignment with continuous delivery.

6h
Report this post
When enterprise applications span Windows thick clients, WinForms, Citrix, mainframes, web apps, and APIs, traditional automation often becomes brittle, slow, and expensive to maintain.

That's exactly what one leading U.S. telecommunications provider set out to change.

With ACCELQ's agentic automation platform, they transformed desktop testing into a faster, more resilient, and scalable process, delivering measurable business impact.

📖 Swipe through to see the transformation, then explore the case study that shows how modern enterprises can automate complex desktop environments without relying on fragile, machine-dependent scripts.
#TestAutomation
#QualityEngineering
#ACCELQ

AI can generate tests in seconds. But can it preserve the context, governance, and traceability needed to keep them reliable as your applications evolve?

Join
Shriram Krishnan
at
Testing Talks Conference
Sydney 2026 for an insightful session:
🎤 50 First Dates: The Agentic Suite You Fall in Love with Every Morning
🗓️ 6 August 2026
🕓 4:00 PM – 4:45 PM

Discover why lifecycle management is the missing link in many agentic testing approaches, and how organizations can move beyond stateless AI to achieve autonomous quality engineering with the right balance of intelligent automation and human oversight.

Stop by the
#ACCELQ
booth to continue the conversation and see how
#ACCELQAutopilot
is helping teams transform software testing with agentic AI.

See you in Sydney!
#TestingTalksConference
#TestingTalks
#QualityEngineering
#AgenticAI

The best validation of AI isn't a feature list, it's a customer who trusts it with their next release.

From cutting hours of manual effort to building automation faster with AI, stories like these remind us that the future of quality engineering isn't about replacing testers, it's about giving them superpowers.

Hear how
Akshay Talekar
transformed Salesforce testing with ACCELQ and why he believes the best outcomes come from combining human expertise with Agentic AI.

Three minutes. One live demo. Countless possibilities. 🏆
 
That's all the time we had on stage at
Bharat Dreamin'
2026 Demo Jam to show the Salesforce community what the future of quality engineering looks like.
 
No slides. No videos. Just a live demonstration of
#ACCELQConverse
: our conversational AI experience built on deep application intelligence that helps teams move toward autonomous testing.
 
The room was filled with incredible innovation, making every presentation a reminder of what's possible when technology meets creativity. So when the audience cheered for
#ACCELQ
and the judges announced ACCELQ Converse as the Demo Jam Winner, it was a moment we'll never forget.
 
This recognition belongs to every engineer, designer, product leader, marketer, and innovator behind ACCELQ. It also belongs to the amazing Trailblazer community whose curiosity, feedback, and enthusiasm inspire us to keep building.
 
A heartfelt thank you to the Bharat Dreamin' organizers, the judges, and everyone who voted for us. 

Read news here:
https://lnkd.in/dwc5jK5V
#BharatDreamin
#JustAsk
#AgenticAI
#AutonomousTesting

Back in Sydney. Back for year four and this time, we're taking the conversation beyond automation.

We're excited to return as a Platinum Sponsor at
Testing Talks Conference
Sydney 2026, marking our fourth consecutive year of being part of one of Australia's leading
#SoftwareTesting
and
#QualityEngineering
events.

Stop by the ACCELQ booth to experience live demos of
#ACCELQAutopilot
and see how autonomous quality engineering is transforming the testing lifecycle, from intelligent test discovery and autonomous test design to self-healing automation.

🎤 Don't miss
Shriram Krishnan
's session:
50 First Dates: The Agentic Suite You Fall in Love with Every Morning
📅 6 August 2026
🕓 4:00 PM onwards

Whether you're exploring AI-powered quality engineering, modernizing your automation strategy, or simply curious about what's next, we'd love to connect.

See you in Sydney! 👋

If one word could describe
Bharat Dreamin'
2026, it'd be: ELECTRIC. ⚡
 
From the moment the doors opened, the energy was contagious. Every conversation sparked a new idea, every session challenged the status quo, and every interaction reminded us why the Salesforce
#TrailblazerCommunity
is unlike any other.
 
A huge thank you to everyone who stopped by the ACCELQ booth, explored how
#AgenticAI
is reshaping Salesforce testing, joined
Geosley Andrades
' session, and packed the Demo Jam. The excitement, curiosity, and thought-provoking conversations made every minute worthwhile.
 
Bharat Dreamin' 2026 was a perfect reminder that the future of
#Salesforce
innovation is being built by a community that's always ready to learn, collaborate, and push boundaries.
 
To the organizers, volunteers, speakers, and every
#Trailblazer
who made this event unforgettable, thank you for an incredible experience.
 
Until next time, keep dreaming, keep innovating, and keep building what's next. 💙🚀
#BharatDreamin
#ACCELQ
#AgenticAI
#SalesforceTesting

ACCELQ Autopilot : Agentic Test Automation powered by GenAI and QGPT
•
•
184,269 views
1 year ago
ACCELQ's Autopilot represents a sophisticated implementation of generative AI in test automation that goes beyond basic script generation. It offers an interconnected suite of AI capabilities that work together to transform how teams create, maintain, and scale their test automation.
 
At its core, Autopilot combines multiple intelligent features that address the fundamental challenges in test automation:
- The Scenario Discovery and Test Step Generator automatically creates comprehensive test scenarios and detailed test steps from simple business descriptions, understanding both UI and API testing needs.
- The AI Designer for Modularity intelligently structures tests into reusable components, ensuring tests are built as maintainable assets rather than isolated scripts.
- The Test Case Generator creates diverse test combinations that cover various business scenarios, automatically populating relevant test data while maintaining logical relationships.
- The Logic Insights feature provides contextual understanding and optimization suggestions, essentially embedding test architecture expertise into the tool.   
- The Autonomous Healing capability automatically adapts to application changes, even handling complex modifications like element type changes, while providing AI-augmented troubleshooting support.

Learn more:
https://www.accelq.com/platform/autop...
